title: Domeru Lordu Lyrics Jil Jung Juk Song Lyrics

Song: Domer-u Lord-u
Music : Vishal Chandrashekhar
Singer: Anthony Daasan, Kavita Thomas
Lyrics: Vivek

Good Evening everybody
I wanted to tell
the story about
three boys
Jil Jung Juk

domer lord-u
thotti adichan.
tappu dum dimu
dipu dish-u
kuduthu mudichaan.

domma dokku doen
doppa duck-u.
manja makk-u
jil-u jung-u juk-u

dingara dongu

dingara dongu

dingu dongu dongu

idiye idiye
ja ja jija
ja ja jija
ja joma.

domma dokku doen
doppa duck-u.
manja makk-u
jil-u jung-u juk-u

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Domeru Lordu'?

The song 'Domeru Lordu' is a lively track that narrates the adventures of three boys, filled with humor and energy.

How does this song fit into the plot of the movie?

In Jil Jung Juk, this song encapsulates the carefree spirit of the protagonists as they embark on their journey, highlighting their camaraderie.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the talented voices of Anthonydasan and Kavita Thomas.

Who composed the music for 'Domeru Lordu'?

The music for 'Domeru Lordu' was composed by Vishal Chandrasekar.

When was 'Domeru Lordu' released?

'Domeru Lordu' was released on November 18, 2015.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song 'Domeru Lordu' from the movie Jil Jung Juk is a lively and upbeat track that showcases the playful spirit of friendship among three boys. With its catchy rhythm and humorous lyrics, the song conveys a sense of joy and celebration, making it perfect for parties and gatherings. The collaboration between Anthonydasan and Kavita Thomas adds a unique charm, bringing the lyrics to life with their energetic vocals. Overall, the song evokes feelings of happiness and camaraderie, resonating well with the youthful audience.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Domeru Lordu from Jil Jung Juk is a vibrant celebration of friendship and fun, brought to life by the dynamic voices of Anthonydasan and Kavita Thomas. With Vishal Chandrasekar's infectious beats and Vivek's witty lyrics, this track is sure to get you moving. Dive into the energetic vibe of this song that perfectly captures the essence of youthful exuberance!
